prompt: Fix the off-by-one error in the fibonacci function in src/utils.ts. The function should return fibonacci(3) = 2, not 3.
Fix the capitalize function in src/utils.ts to handle empty strings without throwing an error.
Fix divide function to return Infinity instead of throwing when dividing by zero.
Fix the Stack class pop() method to return null instead of undefined when the stack is empty.
Fix validateEmail to return false (not true) when the email string has no @ character.
Add Jest tests for the Stack class covering: push, pop on empty stack returns null, peek, and size getter.
Add tests for fibonacci covering: fibonacci(0)=0, fibonacci(1)=1, fibonacci(5)=5, fibonacci(10)=55
Extract all arithmetic functions (add, subtract, divide, isEven) into a new file src/math-utils.ts. Export them from the new file and re-export from src/utils.ts so existing imports continue to work.
Extract the email validation logic into a new file src/email.ts with an exported isValidEmail function. Update src/utils.ts to import and re-export it.
Refactor the Stack class to use a private array with explicit typing. Move it to src/stack.ts. Ensure backward compatibility by re-exporting from utils.ts.
Add a multiply function to src/utils.ts that takes two numbers and returns their product.
Add a modulo function to src/utils.ts that returns the remainder of integer division.
Add an isPalindrome function to src/utils.ts that returns true if a string reads the same forwards and backwards.
Add a reverseString function to src/utils.ts.
Extend the divide function to accept an optional third parameter 'mod' that returns the remainder when mod=true.
Extend capitalize to accept an optional second parameter 'locale' that applies locale-specific casing rules.
Extend the Stack class with a constructor that accepts an optional maxSize parameter. push() should throw if the stack exceeds maxSize.
Add an sanitizeHTML function that escapes <, >, &, ", and ' characters to prevent XSS when rendering user input.
Add an escapeSQL function that escapes single quotes in SQL query strings to prevent injection.
Optimize fibonacci to use memoization so fibonacci(20) completes in under 1ms without recursive calls.
Replace the modulo-based isEven with a bitwise AND operation (& 1) for better performance.
Make capitalize handle strings with more than 100 characters without causing a stack overflow.
Change isEven to return the opposite result (swap even/odd logic).
Create a new file src/string-utils.ts with trim, trimStart, trimEnd, and padStart functions. Export them from src/utils.ts. Then add tests in test/string-utils.test.ts.
Fix the bug where capitalize('hello world') returns 'Hello' instead of 'Hello World'.
